title: TCG Craft
description: Porting TCG Games to Minecraft one booster pack at a time!
body:
Starting with early sets of Pokemon cards I plan to port as many TCG games as I can to Minecraft. This currently contains the first 3 sets of Pokemon cards and vending machines to acquire them. I am going to move onto Magic the Gathering next. If anyone has a request of game that assets are available for please let me know. If you want to buy me a coffee: https://patreon.com/TheLynx927?utm_medium=unknown&utm_source=join_link&utm_campaign=creatorshare_creator&utm_content=copyLink

 

 

Credits for Assets Pulled or Created:

JappaWakka

Rocket Seviper Shadow

Nemu

Dan Sanjo

Paperfire88

ContentlyForlorn

GoldNoWay

and of course Nintendo for this amazing game to begin with.
